footer.ack:
This work was supported by Institute for Information & communications Technology Promotion(IITP) grant funded by the Korea government(MSIT)
(No.00223446, Development of object-oriented synthetic data generation and evaluation methods)

hero.title: Synthetic Spatio-Temporal Data Vault
hero.subtitle: SSTDV is a research project for generating and evaluation synthetic training data from the real-world spatiotemporal data.

features.heroSubtitle: Generate high-quality synthetic data from real-world spatio-temporal data, and verify quality through statistical and objective metrics.
features.generationSubtitle: Generate high-quality synthetic spatio-temporal data with domain knowledge encoding.
features.knowledgeEncodingDesc: Explicitly encode domain prior knowledge — structure, dynamics, and constraints — into generative models for spatio-temporal data.
features.relationModelingDesc: Model correlations, causality, and teleconnections among multivariate spatio-temporal data to enable data inference.
features.dataAssimilationDesc: Correct accumulated errors and missing data during generation through data perturbation techniques to improve synthesis accuracy.
features.objectiveReinforcementDesc: Learn spatio-temporal data generation models using reward functions aligned with domain data requirements and objectives.
features.evaluationSubtitle: Quantitatively verify the quality of generated synthetic data through statistical similarity and objective relevance.
features.statisticalSimilarityDesc: Quantitatively evaluate distributional similarity and inter-variable correlations between synthetic and real data.
features.objectiveRelevanceDesc: Assess fitness-for-purpose by comparing AI model performance with real-only, synthetic-only, and mixed data configurations.
